name: wrangler
description: Interact with Cloudflare Workers, D1 databases, KV namespaces, R2 buckets, and more via the Wrangler CLI. Supports all wrangler commands with configurable allowlist and denylist at any command depth. Authentication is configured per-agent via apiToken and accountId.
commands: tail [script]                      — tail logs from deployed Worker
d1 database list                   — list D1 databases
d1 database create <name>           — create a D1 database
d1 database destroy <name>          — destroy a D1 database
kv namespace list                  — list KV namespaces
kv key list --namespace-id <id>    — list keys in KV namespace
r2 bucket list                     — list R2 buckets
r2 bucket create <name>             — create an R2 bucket
pages deploy <directory>           — deploy a Pages project
secrets list                       — list secrets for a Worker

apiToken.description: Cloudflare API token with appropriate permissions. Required. Can use ${ENV_VAR} for injection.

accountId.description: Cloudflare account ID. Optional if using a token scoped to a single account. Can use ${ENV_VAR} for injection.

allowCommands.description: If set, only these command paths are permitted. A command path is all subcommand tokens before any flags, e.g. 'd1 database create' or 'kv namespace'. Prefix matching applies: 'd1' allows all d1 subcommands.

denyCommands.description: These command paths are always blocked, even if listed in allowCommands. Deny beats allow. Prefix matching applies: 'd1 database destroy' blocks only that command; 'd1' blocks all d1 subcommands.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for each wrangler invocation. Default: 180.

wranglerPath.description: Override path to wrangler binary. If not set, checks node_modules/.bin/wrangler then global wrangler.
